name: Therion Irregular
name_jp: セリオンズ・イレギュラー
desc: You can target up to 3 "Therion" monsters in your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, equip them to this card. You can discard 1 "Endless Engine Argyro System"; destroy all cards your opponent controls. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then equip the monster this card was equipped to, to this card. You can only use each effect of "Therion Irregular" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target up to 3 "Therion" monsters in your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, equip them to this card. You can discard 1 "Endless Engine Argyro System"; destroy all cards your opponent controls. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then equip the monster this card was equipped to, to this card. You can only use each effect of "Therion Irregular" once per turn.
eff: You can target up to 3 "Therion" monsters in your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, equip them to this card. You can discard 1 "Endless Engine Argyro System"; destroy all cards your opponent controls. While this card is equipped to a monster: You can Special Summon this card, then equip the monster this card was equipped to, to this card. You can only use each effect of "Therion Irregular" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Equips monsters from the player's field to itself
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
